initialIntent:
## Purpose
Create a rental agreement form for construction equipment. Need to capture equipment details, rental period, pricing, insurance requirements, and operator certification.

## Audience
Construction company managers renting heavy equipment (excavators, cranes, bulldozers) from our fleet.

## Constraints
Must comply with OSHA equipment operation requirements. Insurance documentation is mandatory.
finalIntent:
# Construction Equipment Rental Agreement Form

## Overview
This form creates a comprehensive rental agreement for heavy construction equipment. It captures all necessary information for legally compliant equipment rentals including equipment specifications, rental terms, pricing, insurance documentation, and operator certifications.

## Target Users
Construction company managers and project supervisors who are renting heavy equipment (excavators, cranes, bulldozers, loaders, etc.) from our equipment fleet.

## Key Requirements

### Equipment Information
- Equipment type and specific model
- Equipment identification number
- Current condition and meter readings

### Rental Terms
- Rental start and end dates
- Delivery and pickup locations
- Rental rate structure (daily, weekly, monthly)

### Pricing & Payment
- Base rental rate
- Security deposit amount
- Payment terms and method

### Insurance & Compliance
- **Mandatory**: Proof of insurance documentation
- Insurance policy number and coverage amounts
- OSHA compliance acknowledgment

### Operator Certification
- Operator name and certification details
- OSHA certification number
- Certification expiration date

### Safety & Liability
- Equipment inspection acknowledgment
- Damage responsibility agreement
- Safety protocol compliance

## Compliance Notes
All fields related to insurance and operator certification are mandatory to ensure OSHA equipment operation requirements are met. The form enforces documentation of proper insurance coverage before equipment can be released.
schemaDescription: 30 fields: Renting Company Name*, Project Manager Name*, Contact Email*, Contact Phone Number*, Equipment Type*, Equipment Model*, Equipment ID Number*, Current Meter/Hour Reading*, Rental Start Date*, Rental End Date*, Delivery Location*, Pickup Location, Rental Rate Type*, Rental Rate Amount*, Security Deposit*, Payment Method*, Insurance Provider*, Insurance Policy Number*, Coverage Amount*, Insurance Expiration Date*
